title: rhododendron × coriifolium
intro: Rhododendron × coriifolium, a hybrid rhododendron species, is a deciduous shrub that is known for its attractive flowers and medicinal properties. The plant's roots and leaves have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat various health conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. Consuming Rhododendron × coriifolium in moderation has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting digestion. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its potential health benefits.
